title: capability_change SSE Event
description: Notifies the client that the availability of a specific AI capability has changed. The capability status badge in the SparkAi shell updates in real time based on these events.

capability.description: The AI capability whose status changed.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason for the status change (shown in tooltip).

retryAfterSeconds.description: Only present when status='degraded'. Approximate seconds until the capability is expected to recover (for client-side retry timers).
